stages.name: Video Intent Planner
stages.gate: Ask focused questions when route-changing inputs are missing.

stages.name: Story / Structure
stages.gate: Stop if the structure lacks narrative device, beat purpose, or material-ready handoff.

stages.name: Director Shot Plan
stages.gate: Stop if must-have material or required effects are vague or untestable.

stages.name: Material Truth
stages.gate: Generated assets and reviewed material must enter material map before they satisfy needs.

stages.name: Coverage / Decision Gate
stages.gate: BUILD only when delta is ready or accepted revision/waiver re-gates cleanly.

stages.name: BUILD Planning
stages.gate: Stop on GAP clips, invalid source windows, contract/runtime mismatch, or missing accepted branch handoff.

stages.name: Official Render
stages.gate: final.mp4 is only current when written by the active run after gates pass.

stages.name: Verify / Review
stages.gate: Failures route back by owner: material, effects, subtitle/audio, or build.

stages.name: Workbench Draft Review
stages.gate: Draft artifacts must not overwrite canonical truth.

stages.name: Brownfield / Finishing
stages.gate: Finishing-only fixes return to owning branch or BUILD; material-truth changes return to Material Map.

stages.name: Delivery
stages.gate: Delivery must pass technical verify plus material/audio/subtitle/effect semantic evidence; warnings are blocked.

branch_contract_registry.purpose: Machine-readable ownership contracts for Hermes main route and side branches. This registry defines entry conditions, canonical artifacts, stop gates, forbidden writes, and return routes so agents can route work without guessing.
global_rules: Existing run state wins: inspect tools/pipeline_home.py before writing when a run folder exists.
Whole-video requests enter Stage 0 first; side branches are child lanes unless the request is bounded branch-only work.
Branch outputs are not canonical delivery until the owning gate accepts them.
Workbench, Effect Factory, Soundtrack Arranger, Subtitle/Voiceover, and Verify must not overwrite upstream canonical truth directly.
Delivery readiness is decided by delivery gate evidence, not verify_result.pass alone.

branches.name: Main Video Pipeline
branches.purpose: Owns Stage 0 route selection, full-video orchestration, BUILD eligibility, delivery promotion, and branch return coordination.
entry_conditions: new or fuzzy whole-video request
existing run resume/inspect request
delivery/export/final candidate request
branch handoff returning to main route
stop_gates: branch child contract is required but unresolved
forbidden_writes: canonical material or timeline rewrites from side branch claims

branches.name: Material Map
branches.purpose: Owns material truth: inventory, visual/audio/source understanding, scene-to-need edges, coverage delta, generated/reshoot/rewrite decisions, and one-source highlight understanding.
entry_conditions: material_contract or entry_path is material-first
user provides footage/photos/audio-video source folder
one long video/interview/podcast highlight request
material delta requires generated candidate, reshoot, rewrite, drop, or waiver
stop_gates: inventory scope not reviewed when required
must-have need has no accepted satisfies edge
dialogue/script windows are unreviewed or cut incomplete sentences
generated candidate has no explicit review
forbidden_writes: BUILD/render from filenames only when visual evidence is required
treating storyboard or motion preview as delivery

branches.name: Soundtrack Arranger
branches.purpose: Owns music/song/BGM sourcing intent, section placement, source candidates, license/source notes, soundtrack probing, and Audio Director handoff.
entry_conditions: soundtrack_contract requests song/BGM/mixed music
bounded request asks for music/song/BGM/source search
BUILD requires music source, license manifest, or ducking plan
existing draft needs music replacement or section-aware audio planning
stop_gates: reference-only famous song selected for delivery
required speech preservation or ducking policy unresolved
forbidden_writes: covering required original speech without explicit policy

branches.name: Subtitle / Voiceover
branches.purpose: Owns subtitle intent, caption readability evidence, narration/voiceover provider handoff, VoxCPM provider bridge, and BUILD-facing subtitle/voiceover readiness.
entry_conditions: subtitle_voiceover_contract requires subtitles, narration, or voiceover
existing draft needs subtitle repair
BUILD requires narration audio or subtitle handoff
delivery gate reports caption/readability/voiceover evidence missing
required_inputs: script/narration lines when voiceover is required
caption_audit.json when subtitle delivery is required
stop_gates: voiceover provider unavailable and fallback disabled
forbidden_writes: synthesizing TTS from handoff acceptance alone
pretending missing provider audio is ready

branches.name: Effect Factory
branches.purpose: Owns semantic-to-effect translation, visual technique parameters, Remotion/light backend handoff, effect review, and bounded effect assets. It is a factory/translator, not a final renderer.
entry_conditions: effect_policy marks a required or bounded effect
user asks for opening/title/transition/highlight/visual treatment only
Workbench/Brownfield asks for finishing effect
delivery gate reports required effect evidence missing
stop_gates: required effect has no render/review evidence
backend cannot render the requested effect and no fallback is accepted
effect output is generic and does not satisfy story function
forbidden_writes: claiming Remotion draft assets are final delivery

branches.name: Workbench / Brownfield
branches.purpose: Owns draft-only local patching, preview timeline editing, user review handoff, and route-back patches. It is the black-box editing workbench, not the source of canonical truth.
entry_conditions: user refers to draft/rough cut/final candidate/local fix
verified preview review decision requests revise_workbench
BUILD/Verify creates a preview timeline for review
user wants to swap clip, adjust subtitle, audio cue, or finishing effect
required_inputs: material candidates or current clip refs
route-back owner for each patch type
stop_gates: patch changes material truth without Material Map review
patch changes required effect/audio/subtitle without owning branch acceptance

branches.name: Verify / Delivery Gate
branches.purpose: Owns fail-closed review, final product evidence, material/audio/subtitle/effect semantic gates, delivery packaging, and repair routing.
entry_conditions: final candidate or preview candidate needs review
user asks whether output is correct
delivery/export/publish request
branch handoff needs acceptance evidence
stop_gates: verify_result.pass=true but semantic delivery gate fails
forbidden_writes: repairing canonical artifacts directly from verify findings

branches.name: Main Video Pipeline
branches.purpose: Owns Stage 0 route selection, full-video orchestration, BUILD eligibility, delivery promotion, and branch return coordination.
entry_conditions: new or fuzzy whole-video request

stop_gates: branch child contract is required but unresolved
